headline: Boston Scientific Trial Wins Highlight Growth Potential In Electrophysiology And Stroke Care
summary: Boston Scientific (NYSE:BSX) released new clinical trial results for its FARAPULSE PFA Platform and WATCHMAN LAAC at Heart Rhythm 2026. The AVANT GUARD trial reported superiority of FARAPULSE PFA over anti arrhythmic drugs for persistent atrial fibrillation. Additional data backed the safety and effectiveness of the FARAFLEX PFA Catheter and WATCHMAN FLX LAAC therapies, with positive long term outcomes. For investors tracking NYSE:BSX, this batch of clinical data touches two key areas where...
